ogTitle: St Ives vs St Ives Chase: Climate Safety

heading: St Ives vs St Ives Chase — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between St Ives, New South Wales and St Ives Chase, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: St Ives Chase has a lower overall climate risk score (42/100) compared to St Ives (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is St Ives or St Ives Chase safer from flooding?
faq.answer: St Ives has a flood risk score of 53/100, while St Ives Chase scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: St Ives scores 41/100 for bushfire risk. St Ives Chase scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in St Ives or St Ives Chase?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. St Ives Chase has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
